headline: 4 Security Stocks to Watch Amid the Flourishing Industry Trend
summary: The Zacks Security industry participants, PANW, CRWD, FTNT and OKTA, gain from an increase in data breaches, prompting companies to seek comprehensive IT security solutions.

headline: CRWD Stock Rises 10% Post Q4 Results: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: CrowdStrike jumps 9.6% after Q4 results beat estimates, driven by strong Falcon Flex adoption, but its premium valuation suggests a cautious stance.
